opinion.h: HOOVER v. OKLAHOMA TURNPIKE AUTHORITY , 368 U.S. 803 (1961)
Bill HOOVER v. OKLAHOMA TURNPIKE AUTHORITY. No. 957.
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Petition for rehearing dismissed under the 60th Rule of this Court, 28 U.S.C.A.[ Hoover v. Oklahoma Turnpike Authority 368 U.S. 803 (1961) ]
